STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-29-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JAN-29-1996, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND AS TO WHY PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT BY DECLARATION. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
